<includeonly><table class="infobox">
<caption>{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</caption>
{{#if:{{{image|}}}|<tr><td colspan="2" class="infobox-image">[[File:{{{image}}}|frameless|220px]]{{#if:{{{caption|}}}|<div style="font-size:90%">{{{caption}}}</div>}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{type|}}}|<tr><th>Type</th><td>{{{type}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{areas|}}}|<tr><th>Areas</th><td>{{{areas}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{disciplines|}}}|<tr><th>Disciplines</th><td>{{{disciplines}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{key_drawings|}}}|<tr><th>Key drawings</th><td>{{{key_drawings}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{key_specs|}}}|<tr><th>Key specs</th><td>{{{key_specs}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{status|}}}|<tr><th>Status</th><td>{{{status}}}</td></tr>}}
</table></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Infobox system
| name         = Primary Sludge Collection
| type         = Process Piping
| areas        = [[Area 03|Area 03]], [[Area 09|Area 09]]
| disciplines  = Mechanical, I&C
| key_drawings = [[Drawing:M-401]], [[Drawing:M-901]]
| key_specs    = [[Spec:40 05 00]]
| status       = Design Complete
}}
</pre>

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
